fields.name: Report ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the object ID of the report.

fields.name: Report Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the report.

fields.name: Company Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Business Central company that the report layout applies to. You to create report layouts that can only be used on reports when they are run for a specific to a company. If the field is blank, then the layout will be available for use in all companies.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the file type of the report layout. The following table includes the types that are available:

fields.name: Last Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time of the last change to the report layout entry.

fields.name: Last Modified by User
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user who made the last change to the report layout entry.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the report layout.

fields.name: Built-In
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the report layout is built-in or not.
